name: Chocolate Dipped Macadamia Nut Shortbread Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually stir in powdered sugar, vanilla, flour, chopped macadamia nuts, semisweet chocolate chips (or milk chocolate chips), and vegetable shortening until well blended.
3. Shape the dough into a roll about 2 inches in diameter using wax paper.
4. Wrap the rolled dough in paper and foil and refrigerate for at least two hours or overnight.
5. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
6. Cut the chilled roll into slices approximately 1/4 to 1/2 inch thick.
7. Place the cookie slices on an ungreased baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, or until they begin to brown.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
9. Melt chocolate chips in a small bowl using a microwave; stir in shortening until well combined.
10. Dip one end of each cooled cookie into the melted chocolate mixture.
11. Place the dipped cookies on wax paper and refrigerate until the chocolate hardens.
12. Store the cookies in a cool place. Makes 2-3 dozen cookies.
